Title: LINERY Ski Gloves Men Waterproof Snowboard Gloves for Cold Weather Skiing & Snowboarding Gloves Fits Both Men & Women Descripion: ['Our' 'LINERY'
 'ski glove will be the only glove you need for a whole season at the ski resort. Thanks to water-repellent shells, fleece liner and durable PU palms, these insulated gloves keep your hands dry and cozy while you shred all season long.'
 '4 Size for You to Choose( Glove Size ):'
 'LADY SMALL: 3.25-3.45 inches across palm of gloves, 2.75-2.95 inch length of middle finger, 10.25 inches total length.'
 'LADY MEDIUM: 3.45-3.65 inches across palm of gloves, 2.95-3.15 inch length of middle finger, 10.63 inches total length.'
 'MEN MEDIUM: 3.55-3.75 inches across palm of gloves, 3.15-3.35 inch length of middle finger, 10.95 inches total length.'
 'MEN LARGE: 3.85-4.05 inches across palm of gloves, 3.35-3.54 inch length of middle finger, 11.25 inches total length.'
 'Note: It’s suggested to test the palm circumference and middle finger length, take the size chart as reference to choose the right size. Manual measured, 0.4-0.8 inches deviation allowed.']

Non-slip design: The excellent notebook stand provides many silicone pads such as in the U-type groove and under the notebook dock to prevent your device from being scratched and stay on the desk. Space-saving: Keep your laptop vertical and make your desktop well organized to save more space quickly.']
